hooks.command: cmd=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command' 2>/dev/null) || true; if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE 'make .*(deploy)' || echo "$cmd" | grep -qE 'git push' || echo "$cmd" | grep -qE '(^|[;&|] *)(sudo )?aws ' || echo "$cmd" | grep -qE 'docker compose .*(deploy)' || echo "$cmd" | grep -qE '(^|[;&|] *)(sudo )?rm -rf ' || echo "$cmd" | grep -qE '(cat|head|tail|less|more|bat|source|\.) +(\S*/)*\.(env|npmrc|yarnrc)'; then echo '{"decision": "block", "reason": "Blocked: make *deploy*, git push*, aws *, docker compose *deploy*, rm -rf, reading .env*/.npmrc*/.yarnrc* files"}'; else echo '{"decision": "allow"}'; fi
